title: Hunted...
description: A modpack in which the player is, put simply, not safe...
body:
# **General**

This modpack, which I will not spoil, simply makes the player feel watched, the goal is to survive for as long as possible where threats lurk everywhere, and the world itself turns against you, one thing however is certain, you can run, but you can't hide...

Good luck, because you will need it...


# **WARNING**

This includes some extremely resource intensive mods which means that you MUST set your render distance really low and use shaders ONLY on high-end devices

# **Installation**

- If you are using the default client, good luck
- If you are using a launcher made for mods (Like modrinth, curseforge, or ATLauncher) just install it from the launcher directly.
- For prism or multiMC you _can_ drag the pack into the client but installing it from the launcher is sooooo much easier


# **Suggestions**
- Turn down render distances
- Play with friends
- Play at night (This is not for the faint of heart)
- Don't use fullbright
- RUN

# **All Mods included**
Link: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HHX03ojthdRISYuatqIqhJWezBU1rHfbRbGQ3Qig-uo/edit?usp=sharing

# **My other projects**
https://modrinth.com/user/Omar_Masoud
